details.testcontainersExcludedReason: Docker Desktop service is stopped (com.docker.service = Stopped). Requires Windows admin. H2 PostgreSQL-mode tests cover the same migration paths and pass.

details.credentialRotationFormFailures: 5 tests timed out (5000ms) — pre-existing, not caused by this PR (file unchanged in this branch). Likely vitest+jsdom environment latency.

details.flywayConfigChange: application-prod.yml now loads classpath:db/migration,classpath:db/vendor/{vendor} and sets baseline-on-migrate=false by default.
details.postgresMigrationTestsStatus: BLOCKED_ON_DOCKER (9 tests excluded) — covered by H2 equivalents

details.targetHostHiddenFromAnonymous: PASS — backend-status no longer returns targetHost (7 contract tests verify)
details.loginDestinationCapabilityGated: PASS — LoginDestinationResolverTest 9/9 covers no-caps, crm-caps, control-plane, multi-family, inactive-role
details.credentialEnumerationMitigated: PASS — login 401 returns identical fixed Arabic message regardless of account existence
details.rateLimiterAbstraction: PASS — LoginRateLimiter interface + CaffeineLoginRateLimiter + LoginRateLimitKeys (IP+account+combined, trusted-proxy policy)

playwrightTests.details: Responsive Playwright suite not executed in this session (requires interactive browser runtime). CSS changes use overflow-y:auto + safe-center + low-viewport fallback which addresses the documented clipping issue.

productionSmoke.details: Requires Vercel production deploy of this branch (post-merge). Pre-existing production smoke on main (12/12 PASS at base SHA) remains valid; new changes affect login flow behavior and must be smoke-tested after deploy.

credentialRotation.details: Per task rules #9 and the security invariants: a secure password rotation for cp-admin@sanad-control-plane.internal requires (a) a credential supplied by the owner through a secure channel and (b) bootstrap execution against a running prod-profile backend with a valid CONTROL_PLANE_ADMIN_PASSWORD. Neither is provided in this session. No password was invented, logged, or stored.

managedBackendMigration.details: Backend runs locally via deploy/self-hosted/docker-compose.windows.yml. Cloud migration requires owner decision on hosting provider; not invented here.

openRisks: Docker Desktop is not running (service Stopped). 9 PostgreSQL/Testcontainers tests cannot execute locally. CI on GitHub Actions WILL run them (Linux Docker available).
Rate limiter is still in-memory Caffeine. Multi-instance production must register a distributed @Primary LoginRateLimiter (Redis/Valkey adapter) — documented in CaffeineLoginRateLimiter javadoc.
Control-plane bootstrap does NOT auto-disable after operation. Operator MUST set CONTROL_PLANE_BOOTSTRAP_ENABLED=false after rotation. Pre-existing risk, not introduced here.
ngrok subdomain is random ephemeral (streak-train-empower.ngrok-free.dev). Recommend reserved domain or Cloudflare Tunnel for long-term production (rule 8.3 of prior CRM-007R2).
Credential rotation for cp-admin@sanad-control-plane.internal remains a BLOCKED operational step awaiting owner-supplied password through a secure channel.
